# Open question entry (copy into open-questions.md)

Add a row to the right section table in [../product/open-questions.md](../product/open-questions.md).

| ID | Question | Options / notes | Blocks | Status |
|----|----------|-----------------|--------|--------|
| OQ-XXX | **Short title** — full question? | Option A; Option B; constraints | FEAT-… or milestone | open |

When decided:

1. Set `Status` to `decided`.
2. Record in [Resolved](../product/open-questions.md#resolved) with link to ADR or updated spec.
3. Update [project-brief](../product/project-brief.md) or create `docs/design/decisions/ADR-*.md` if architectural.
